top_5_fixes: Add negative tests for publish_ci_summary invalid JSON input handling and error messaging.
Add CI step to run only summary-script tests on workflow/script changes for faster feedback.
Add test coverage for append behavior when GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY already contains content.
Consider exposing publish_ci_summary functions as a small library module for easier import testing.
Add a markdown snapshot test to guard summary formatting stability across future changes.
